mapper.select: SELECT * FROM organization WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM organization WHERE org_level = #{orgLevel} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

WITH RECURSIVE cte AS ( SELECT id FROM organization WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT o.id FROM organization o INNER JOIN cte ON o.parent_id = cte.id WHERE o.deleted = 0 ) SELECT id FROM cte WHERE id != #{id}
